title: July 2022 — 'relax, let things flow and happen naturally' (reverse of trying)
html:
TL;DR

  • Two-line July 2022 maxim: "Relax, let things flow and happen naturally — reverse of trying."
  • A near-explicit wu wei / Taoist frame — "the reverse of trying" is essentially the disconnected from outcome move Yahir comes back to repeatedly.
  • Sister to 2022 06 10 always give take comes — a one-month-later companion maxim. Together they sketch a summer 2022 philosophy mini-cluster: give without scoring, try without straining.
  • Foreshadows the 2024 2026 saas pivot's recurring "let it cook" / "trust the process" voice and the normal neutral to everything frame.
  • A clean expression of a posture Yahir oscillates with — see counter-pole at 2022 07 24 dont want something not willing to work for (max-effort flavor) two days later.

What's actually in the note

Relax, let things flow and happen naturally.
Reverse of trying.

Why it matters

Three reasons:

  1. Taoist undercurrent. Yahir doesn't cite taoism explicitly here, but "reverse of trying" is its operational core. Worth tracking whether he ever names the source.
  2. Counter-pole oscillation. Two days later he writes 2022 07 24 dont want something not willing to work for — a much harder, hustle-flavored maxim. The 2022 Yahir is triangulating between flow and effort, not committed to either.
  3. Continuity to current voice. The normal neutral to everything page (2024–25 era) reads like a more developed version of this same posture.

Open questions

  • What prompted it? (Note is undated context — could be a specific frustration, could be summer downtime in Grants Pass.)
  • Did he act on it? (Hard to say from a maxim; the 2022 09 04 never been in love vietnam note suggests he was not in flow regarding romance.)

Wikilinks
